keyEvents.text: Goal!  Haiti 1, Jamaica 0. Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Fafá Picault with a cross.
Goal!  Haiti 1, Jamaica 1. Demarai Gray (Jamaica) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
Carl Sainté (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Jamaica. Shamar Nicholson replaces Dujuan Richards.
Substitution, Haiti. Bryan Alcéus replaces Carl Sainté.
Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Haiti 1, Jamaica 2. Shamar Nicholson (Jamaica) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Michail Antonio with a cross.
Goal!  Haiti 1, Jamaica 3. Leon Bailey (Jamaica) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Daniel Johnson with a through ball.
Substitution, Haiti. Duckens Nazon replaces Mikaël Cantave.
Substitution, Jamaica. Karoy Anderson replaces Joel Latibeaudiere.
Substitution, Jamaica. Demario Phillips replaces Demarai Gray.
Substitution, Haiti. Jonel Désiré replaces Louicius Deedson.
Substitution, Haiti. Stéphane Lambese replaces Carlens Arcus.
Stéphane Lambese (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Haiti 2, Jamaica 3. Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Fafá Picault with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Jamaica. Michael Hector replaces Michail Antonio.
Demario Phillips (Jamaica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. Jeppe Simonsen replaces Djimy Alexis because of an injury.
Substitution, Jamaica. Jahshaun Anglin replaces Daniel Johnson.
